title: Moderation Rules
description: **1️⃣ Use the gray button above to add new rules. 2️⃣ Select a rule from the dropdown below. 3️⃣ When you're done, click the red button above.**

oneOf.title: 🚫 Block Specific Words
oneOf.description: Deletes messages containing specific banned words. It automatically catches different capitalizations and common tricks used to obfuscate words (like writing `b@dw0rd` instead of `badword`). _List of ready-to-use bad words: [🔞 List of Dirty, Naughty, Obscene Words](https://github.com/LDNOOBW/List-of-Dirty-Naughty-Obscene-and-Otherwise-Bad-Words), [☕ Google Profanity Words](https://github.com/coffee-and-fun/google-profanity-words/tree/main/data), [💬 Comment Blocklist](https://github.com/splorp/wordpress-comment-blocklist)_

oneOf.title: 🚫 Block Specific Websites
oneOf.description: Deletes messages that share links to specific forbidden websites (even obfuscated links like `spam [dot] com` or `hxxp://`).

blocked.title: Blocked Websites
blocked.description: Specific websites to block (e.g., `spam.com`). You can block entire domains (e.g., `example.com` will block `sub.example.com`) or only specific subdomains (e.g., `sub.example.com` will block `sub.example.com` but not `example.com`). Do not include `http://` or `https://`, just type the domain name.

oneOf.title: ✅ Allow Only Specific Websites
oneOf.description: Only allows messages with links to approved websites. Messages with links to any other website will be deleted (even if users try to obfuscate the links like `spam [dot] com` or `hxxp://`).

allowed.title: Approved Websites
allowed.description: Add permitted domains (e.g., `simplex.chat`). You can allow entire domain (e.g., `example.com` will allow `sub.example.com` and `example.com`) or allow only the specific sub domain (e.g., `sub.example.com` will allow `sub.example.com` but not `example.com`). Do not include `http://` or `https://`, just type the domain name.  Leave the list empty to block ALL links.

oneOf.title: ✅ Allow Top100 Websites Only
oneOf.description: Only allows links to well-known, safe websites (**Google**, **GitHub**, **Wikipedia**, **YouTube**, **Reddit**, etc.). Messages linking to unknown websites are deleted (even obfuscated links like `spam [dot] com` or `hxxp://`).
